summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pokemon Card Binder new features. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend functionality working correctly. New features tested: Binders CRUD, Cards by Set, Vitrine public showcase, role-based access control (admin vs child).
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint
Backend: Admin login (admin@pokemon.com / Admin123!) - returns role=admin
Backend: Admin /auth/me endpoint
Backend: Child login (leo@pokemon.com / Pokemon123) - returns role=child
Backend: GET /api/binders - returns binders list
Backend: POST /api/binders - creates new binder
Backend: DELETE /api/binders/:id - deletes binder
Backend: Child cannot create binder (403)
Backend: Child cannot delete binder (403)
Backend: GET /api/cards/by-set - returns cards grouped by set
Backend: POST /api/vitrine/create - creates vitrine token (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/vitrine/:token - returns public vitrine data with stats
Backend: Child cannot create vitrine (403)
Backend: Invalid vitrine token returns 404
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - clears session
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Red 'Deconnexion' button visible for admin
Frontend: All navigation tabs visible for admin (Mon Classeur, Extensions, Classeurs, Mes Stats)
Frontend: Vitrine button visible for admin
Frontend: Extensions tab shows cards grouped by set with count and value
Frontend: Classeurs tab shows binder management with 'Nouveau' button
Frontend: Binder creation modal with name, description, color picker
Frontend: Vitrine modal shows shareable link with copy and open buttons
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page
Frontend: Public vitrine page (/vitrine/:token) displays collection with stats, set distribution
Frontend: Child login shows 'Bienvenue Leo !' welcome message
Frontend: Child does NOT see Classeurs tab (correct)
Frontend: Child does NOT see Vitrine button (correct)
Frontend: Child does NOT see 'Ajouter une carte' button (correct)
Frontend: Child sees 'Jouer !' button prominently
Frontend: Child can see admin's cards in read-only mode
Frontend: Child logout works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test binders created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Binders, Extensions view, Vitrine, role-based access) are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover all new endpoints. The app has 2 cards in the collection (Trevenant from Obsidian Flames, Porygon2 from Ancient Origins). One binder 'Mes Preferees' exists. Type filters only appear if cards have types stored.

features_verified.logout_button: Red 'Deconnexion' button visible for both admin and child
features_verified.binders_crud: Admin can create, view, delete binders. Child cannot create/delete.
features_verified.extensions_view: Cards grouped by set with count and total value
features_verified.type_filters: Type filter buttons appear when cards have types
features_verified.vitrine: Admin can create public vitrine link. Public page shows stats, set distribution, card grid.
features_verified.role_based_access: Child cannot see Classeurs tab, Vitrine button, or Add card button
